name: RIDM
description: 新加坡AI计算初创公司RIDM，开发DODA架构解决AI内存瓶颈，已获韩国The Invention Lab和QRT联合种子轮投资，拥有三项国际专利。
description_en: Singapore-based AI computing startup RIDM develops DODA architecture to solve memory bottlenecks in AI, secured seed funding from Korea's The Invention Lab and QRT, backed by three international patents.
why_matters: 种子轮获The Invention Lab与管理380亿美元资产的QRT联合投资，专注突破内存墙瓶颈的DODA数据流架构，NUS博士团队持三项国际专利，已与QRT启动FPGA PoC验证。
why_matters_en: Seed round backed by The Invention Lab and QRT (managing $38B AUM), DODA dataflow architecture targets Memory Wall in AI computing, NUS PhD-led team with three international patents, running FPGA PoC with QRT.
latest_news: 2026-02-27: The Invention Lab完成对RIDM的种子投资，与QRT联合。
latest_news_en: 2026-02-27: The Invention Lab completes seed investment in RIDM, co-led with QRT.

name: 联想 AI Workmate

why_matters: 办公桌AI工作伙伴概念，专注生产力场景。

name: Minit Games
description: Minit Games是一家德国AI驱动短视频游戏Feed初创公司。
description_en: Minit Games is a German startup advancing AI-driven short-form gaming feeds.
why_matters: 2026年3月获得170万欧元种子轮融资，用于推进AI驱动短形式游戏内容，在2025-2026欧洲游戏生态中吸引早期资金。
why_matters_en: Secured €1.7M funding in March 2026 to advance AI-driven short-form gaming, part of early-stage investments in European gaming ecosystem.

community_verdict.summary: HN 暂无足够评论样本用于形成社区结论。 用户反馈既包含认可，也提出了执行层面的质疑。 对 PM 来说，关键是验证需求强度与可持续增长。

name: Kris@Work
description: AI-native GTM执行平台，为企业营收团队提供统一的销售、客户成功和支持工作流，使用代理架构和上下文AI自动化从线索生成到账户扩展的全流程。
description_en: AI-native GTM execution platform for enterprise revenue teams that unifies sales, customer success, support, and revenue operations into a single intelligent interface using agentic architecture and contextual AI.
why_matters: 2026年2月完成300万美元种子轮融资，由Info Edge Ventures领投，创始人来自Sprinklr高管，针对科技、金融服务、电信和汽车行业，提供首个端到端AI工作伴侣取代多SaaS工具。
why_matters_en: $3M seed round in Feb 2026 led by Info Edge Ventures with founders ex-Sprinklr CXOs, targets tech/fintech/telecom/automotive sectors as first agentic AI work companion replacing multiple SaaS tools for GTM teams.
latest_news: 2026-02: 完成300万美元种子轮融资，用于扩展美国市场和产品开发。
latest_news_en: 2026-02: Raised $3M seed funding to expand to US market, R&D, and talent acquisition.

why_matters_en: Prosus Ventures led $3M round, founded by Stanford Knight-Hennessy Scholar, pioneering synthetic AI in finance.

name: Ivee
description: AI upskilling platform that trains employees on AI tools, verifies skills via dynamic profiles, and connects employers to AI-fluent talent network.
description_en: AI upskilling platform that trains employees on AI tools, verifies skills via dynamic profiles, and connects employers to AI-fluent talent network.
why_matters: Raised $1M seed backed by Steven Bartlett and Social Impact Enterprises, selected as UK Government’s primary events partner for £2bn AI Upskilling initiative, talent network with 80k+ verified AI skills profiles.
why_matters_en: Raised $1M seed backed by Steven Bartlett and Social Impact Enterprises, selected as UK Government’s primary events partner for £2bn AI Upskilling initiative, talent network with 80k+ verified AI skills profiles.

latest_news_en: 2026-03-02: Raised $1M seed round backed by Steven Bartlett.

name: GreenNode
